case_title: TERRY, VIVIAN ANN VS EPISCOPAL COMMUNITY SERICES et al

docket_entries.description: SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT EPISCOPAL COMMUNITY SERICES

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,533.58 FILED BY TERRY, VIVIAN ANN AS TO DEFENDANT EPISCOPAL COMMUNITY SERICES REGGIO, KENNITH C/O EPISCOPAL SANCTUARY THE NEXT DOOR SHELTER COLEMAN LINZIE, DIRECTOR OF SHELTERS ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-27-2005 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
CASE DISMISSED AGAINST DEFT REGGIO, KENNETH FOR NO SERVICE.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF TERRY, VIVIAN ANN IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT EPISCOPAL COMMUNITY SERICES THE NEXT DOOR SHELTER COLEMAN LINZIE, DIRECTOR OF SHELTERS PER THE NEXT DOOR PARTICIPANT INFORMATION SHEET #8, BELONGINGS "NEXT DOOR IS NOT RESPONSIBLE FOR LOST, STOLEN OR ABANDONED PROPERTY. NEXT DOOR WILL ONLY STORE ABANDONED PROPERTY FOR 72 HRS.... " ON 1/6/04, PLTF SIGNED THAT THE "POLICIES ABOVE HAVE BEEN EXPLAINED TO ME & I UNDERSTAND THIS STATMENTS PLTF DISMISSED CASE AGAINST DEFT REGGIO, KENNETH. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
